source: Awin onboarding email and public Awin advertiser profile pages
disclosure: Awin links are generated for approved advertiser programs when a public advertiser ID and clean merchant URL are available. Commission depends on advertiser approval, program terms, attribution, validation, and payout settings.

programs.summary: Public Awin profile lists deep linking as available for AliExpress US, with broad marketplace coverage across electronics, fashion, home, garden, beauty, health, and accessories.
